items.title: GENIUS Act stand-off: Phantom, Consensys oppose OCC’s stablecoin yield ban
items.whyYouShouldCare: The opposition to the OCC's stablecoin yield ban by major players like Phantom and Consensys could influence regulatory frameworks affecting Solana's DeFi landscape.

items.title: DeFi protocol Carrot becomes first casualty of $285M Drift exploit
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $285M exploit of the Carrot protocol highlights vulnerabilities in DeFi, potentially impacting user confidence and liquidity across Solana's ecosystem.

items.title: Leading Iranian crypto exchange Nobitex was founded by sons of elite political family tied to supreme leaders: Reuters
items.whyYouShouldCare: The connections of Nobitex's founders to Iran's political elite may affect the legitimacy and regulatory scrutiny of crypto activities in regions linked to Solana.
